summary: Move gesture tracking to a Chrome offscreen document and keep feedback inside the controlled webpage.
scope: request camera permission in the visible controller, then run camera tracking in an offscreen document
use video frame callbacks so tracking does not depend on a focused popup window
inject a persistent black status indicator into the controlled webpage and flash directional feedback there
notes: Reload the unpacked extension and refresh the controlled webpage before testing.
The offscreen document keeps recognition active after the controller popup loses focus or closes.
Protected Chrome pages cannot host the in-page indicator or receive gestures.
